workItem.author: marius-patrik
workItem.title: Plan the prompt library content rollout
workItem.body: Break the prompt content rollout into sequenced, reviewable steps.
comments: Keep each step small enough for one worker.

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; branch df/<issue>-<slug> from dev.
policy.enforcement: All merges require green CI and the configured review gate; never force-push or bypass gates.

facts: The manifest scaffold is checked in and validates.

output.schema: Return an ordered list of steps, each with an acceptance check and its dependencies.
